summary: Tested multi-year attendance, period dropdown UI, biweekly trend, TierBadge, mobile layouts. Fixed critical StudentsPage.jsx syntax error (missing closing for space-y-3 container in edit modal). All features working.

test_results.Period dropdown (not pills) on attendanc: PASS - select element with data-testid=period-dropdown found
test_results.UserManagement mobile card layout: PASS - table hidden, cards visible on 390px

bug_fixed.issue: Syntax error at line 698 - missing closing for space-y-3 container in edit modal. Caused 'Compiled with problems' error preventing app from loading.
bug_fixed.fix: Added missing closing tag for space-y-3 div before the buttons row

critical_code_review_comments: StudentsPage.jsx had missing closing tag causing compile error - FIXED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login: admin@test.local / Admin1234! (click 'Sign in with email & password' first). Auth endpoint is /api/auth/login-email. All iteration 19 features working: period dropdown, biweekly trend, mobile layouts. StudentsPage.jsx compile error was fixed (missing ).
